calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar May-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ezekiel D. Carper, of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, Tel. 510.337.1001, for petitioners;
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND and NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
